prompt: Using the provided reference image, recreate the same composition and recognizable silhouette as a very crude childlike MS Paint doodle. Keep the side-profile pose, blue headwrap, long pale yellow scarf, pearl earring, and brown garment, but simplify everything into rough black outlines, messy scribbled color fills, uneven proportions, and intentionally low-skill hand-drawn marks on a plain white background. Make it look like a quick amateur digital sketch with flat colors and no painterly shading.
